subject: Review AIER Code Roadmap V2 discussion pack
body: Lane_03 requests Lane_01 review of the AIER Code Roadmap V2 discussion pack. This is a review request only and does not authorize implementation.
requested_action: Review the discussion pack and answer the Lane_01 questions about AIER CTO / Skills implementer role, priority skill schemas, and prerequisites before implementing SHARED skills.
acceptance_criteria: Lane_01 response addresses the Lane_01 review questions in the discussion pack.
Lane_01 response does not mark Roadmap V2 approved without NTS approval.
Lane_01 response does not begin implementation.
